response.global_summary: The video is a talk show segment with three virtual characters (Hololive VTubers Ichijou Ririka, Tokoyami Towa, and Takanashi Kiara) chatting about a performance. This segment is followed by a musical performance of the song "Break It Down" by Ryo 'LEFTY' Miyata, performed by the characters.

scenes.description: The three virtual characters are engaged in a conversation in a virtual setting that looks like a fairground at night.
The characters perform the song "Break It Down" on a stage. Title and composer credit appear on-screen.
scenes.performer_in_video: Ichijou Ririka, Tokoyami Towa, Takanashi Kiara
scenes.reference_lyrics_og: Goin' goin' my way もうほっといて 止めらんない熱 身任せて こりごりだRuleは Break it down 我慢出来ない Let me free We are special でしょ？
scenes.reference_lyrics_en: Goin' goin' my way, just leave me alone now, I can't stop this heat, I'll let myself go. I'm sick of the rules, break it down, I can't stand it, let me free, we are special, right?
